zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy de Beke於1265年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比時，她的父親Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby42歲，母親Sarah de Furnival42歲。她與Andrew de Peverel結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy de Beke于1265年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比时，她的父亲Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby42岁，母亲Sarah de Furnival42岁。她与Andrew de Peverel结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Beek  .
Hungarian (also Béke): most probably from a Hungarian form of the Turkish status name beg (see Beg ). Alternatively, it may be a pet form of a Hungarian personal name such as Benedek .

variants.name: Beek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johannes, Kurt, Otto.

Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or creek, beek (compare Bek 6), or a habitational name from any of various Dutch places called Beek (in Limburg, Gelderland, and North Brabant), named with the same word.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy de Beke was born in 1265, in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby, was 42 and her mother, Sarah de Furnival, was 42. She married Andrew de Peverel. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy de Beke est née en 1265, à Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Furnival, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew de Peverel. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy de Beke 1265 in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby 42 und ihre Mutter Sarah de Furnival 42. Sie hat Andrew de Peverel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Beke è nata il nel 1265 nel Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Sarah de Furnival, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Andrew de Peverel. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy de Bekeが1265年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーで生まれた時，父Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresbyは42歳，母Sarah de Furnivalは42歳であった。Andrew de Peverelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy de Beke(이)가 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah de Furnival(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Andrew de Peverel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Beke nasceu em 1265, em Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Furnival, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Andrew de Peverel. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy de Beke родилась в 1265 г. в местности спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Furnival, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew de Peverel. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy de Beke nació en 1265, en Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Beke Lord of Eresby, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Sarah de Furnival, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Andrew de Peverel. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas.
